name: seb-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins — tax tools, bot operations, and more

plugins.name: tax-tools
plugins.description: Tax data analysis skills for Claude Code — query taxbot's SQLite DB directly for readiness reviews, free-form analysis, and anomaly scans

plugins.name: bot-ops
plugins.description: Bot operations skills — status, logs, restart, and deploy for Matrix bots managed by botnificent-manager

plugins.name: finance-tools
plugins.description: Finance data skills for Claude Code — query financebot's SQLite DB directly for free-form lookups, monthly reviews, anomaly scans, bank sync, bulk categorization plans, and Splitwise summaries

plugins.name: ai-permission-hook
plugins.description: LLM-evaluated permission hook for Claude Code — auto-approves safe operations, blocks destructive commands, delegates ambiguous decisions to a lightweight LLM

plugins.name: house-tools
plugins.description: House search skills for Claude Code and Cowork — analyze, compare, budget, add-house, and criteria workflows for Seb and Penda's NYC home search. Pairs with the housebot Matrix bot which uses the same prompts directly.
